name: get_emails
description: Fetch the user's recent emails. Use this when the user asks about their email, inbox, or messages. Returns classified emails (HIGH/LOW/NOISE) with summaries.

timeframe.description: How far back to look. Allowed values: 'today', 'recent' (last 7 days). Default: 'today'.

filter.description: Filter by classification. Allowed values: 'all', 'high', 'low'. Default: 'all'.
